# AskMukthiGuru

> AI-guided spiritual conversations rooted in the teachings of Sri Preethaji & Sri Krishnaji. Free, private, always available.

AskMukthiGuru is a free AI spiritual guide that helps seekers move from suffering (self-centric states) toward the Beautiful State through conversation, guided practices (including Serene Mind 3-minute meditation), and reflections drawn from the doctrine of Sri Preethaji & Sri Krishnaji. All responses are grounded in an audited knowledge base of the gurus' teachings.

## Pages

- [Home](https://askmukthiguru.lovable.app/): Landing page, product overview, meet the gurus.
- [Chat](https://askmukthiguru.lovable.app/chat): Talk with the AI spiritual guide.
- [Practices](https://askmukthiguru.lovable.app/practices): Meditation and reflection practices catalog.
- [Spirit Guides](https://askmukthiguru.lovable.app/guides/spirit-guides): Types of spirit guides and how to connect.

## Guides

- [AI-Guided Meditation](https://askmukthiguru.lovable.app/guides/ai-spiritual-companion): Step-by-step guide to using an AI spiritual companion.
- [Beautiful State Meditation](https://askmukthiguru.lovable.app/guides/beautiful-state-meditation): How to enter the Beautiful State.
- [Serene Mind Practice](https://askmukthiguru.lovable.app/guides/serene-mind-practice): The 3-minute Serene Mind meditation for stress.
- [Self-Centric Thinking](https://askmukthiguru.lovable.app/guides/self-centric-thinking): Stop overthinking spiritually.
- [Spiritual Guide for Anxiety](https://askmukthiguru.lovable.app/guides/spiritual-guide-for-anxiety): Using AI spiritual guidance to work with anxiety.
- [From Suffering to Beautiful State](https://askmukthiguru.lovable.app/guides/suffering-to-beautiful-state): Moving from the suffering state to the Beautiful State.

## Optional

- [Privacy](https://askmukthiguru.lovable.app/privacy): Privacy policy.
- [Terms](https://askmukthiguru.lovable.app/terms): Terms of service.
